./CLAUDE.md:199-348
199| The CLI uses a specific pattern for error output to avoid duplication between Cobra and main.go.
200| 
201| **How it works:**
202| 
203| - `root.go` sets `SilenceErrors: true` globally - Cobra never prints errors
204| - `main.go` prints errors to stderr, unless the error is a `SilentError`
205| - Commands return `NewSilentError(err)` when they've already printed a custom message
206| 
207| **When to use `SilentError`:**
208| Use `NewSilentError()` when you want to print

350| - `SaveStep()` - Save session step checkpoint (code + metadata)
351| - `SaveTaskStep()` - Save subagent task step checkpoint

353| - `GetSessionLog()` / `GetSessionInfo()` - Retrieve session data
354| - `ListSessions()` / `GetSession()` - Session discovery
